source_jobs.title: Product Owner
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, and we may help to find the right ones.



Currently, we are looking for an experienced Product Owner for Roosh.



About the company:
At Roosh Investment Group, we back founders, funders, and forward-thinkers to grow businesses and co-create the technologies that will enrich the world.

Roosh invests in companies focused on capitalization (by Roosh Ventures firm) and profitability (by Roosh X). We’re a dedicated team of investors, entrepreneurs and operators. With over 10 years of expertise, we act as partners in growing businesses rather than mere financial backers.

Besides, Roosh’s portfolio includes such companies as a deep-tech company Zibra AI, an R&D company Neurons Lab, a multi-product company Reface, the Roosh Circle and AI HOUSE tech communities, and others.

We are looking for a Product Owner to lead the development and growth of a product, working closely with engineering and marketing teams.



You will:

— Define and communicate the product vision and roadmap aligned with business objectives.
— Analyze market trends, competitors, and customer needs to identify growth opportunities.
— Develop and prioritize the product backlog, ensuring alignment with user and business priorities.
— Work closely with development teams to translate requirements into well-defined features and enhancements.
— Test and validate hypotheses, iterating quickly based on market feedback and data insights.
— Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to ensure successful product positioning and go-to-market execution.
— Monitor key product metrics (LTV, CAC, Retention, Conversion, etc.) and drive data-driven decision-making.
— Engage with key stakeholders to align product direction with business goals and customer expectations.
— Stay up-to-date with industry trends and emerging technologies to maintain a competitive edge.



About you:

— 5+ years of experience as a Product Owner or Product Manager in a product-driven company.
— Proven track record of defining and executing product strategies, especially in B2B or SaaS environments.
— Strong knowledge of product development processes, agile methodologies, and market research techniques.
— Experience in go-to-market strategies, product positioning, and customer segmentation.
— Ability to work with data analytics, business models, and financial metrics to drive growth.
— Hands-on experience in backlog management, feature prioritization, and hypothesis validation.
— Strong communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to align teams toward a common vision.
— Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment with a proactive and strategic mindset.

As a Rooshmate, you will have:
— The coolest team ever
You will join striving and open-minded professionals to share ideas and shape the future.
— Time-off policy to take your time
Twenty-one days of vacation, long and short-term sick leaves, compensatory days off, maternity and paternity leaves, and more — everything for you to make up your life according to your needs.
— Medical insurance
Perfectly packed health care covering dental.
— Boosting your expertise
We’re interested in accelerating your growth — hence we compensate for your professional development courses and conferences. You will get access to all Roosh educational or business activities, where we engage top-notch experts from diverse areas to master hard and soft skills.
— Financial support in various life circumstances
We will support you in joy and sorrow of this unpredictable life.

How the hiring process goes?
Our hiring process is designed to ensure that we are a perfect match. So be ready to come across:
— interview with Recruiter: we’ll talk about Roosh and answer all your questions,
— tech interview: we want to see how you think, bring ideas, and work with info. Then we’ll give you f

source_jobs.title: CPO
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, we may help to find the right ones.

Currently, we are looking for a СРО to build the Lifestyle Super App from scratch.




ROLE SUMMARY



LIFESTYLE SUPER APP — AN APPLICATION THAT COMBINES TRAVEL, DELIVERY, AND BANKING IN A SINGLE MOBILE INTERFACE. FOCUS: USER EXPERIENCE AND LOCAL NEEDS.



Product Scope

 - Fiat payments — integrations with card services.

 - Travel module — booking flights, hotels, events (Kiwi, Amadeus, Duffel).

 - Food & Service Delivery — ordering food, groceries, services (Careem, Talabat, Glovo).

 - Bank card — virtual/physical, for in-app spending.

 - Loyalty and referral system — cashbacks, referrals, gamification.



Stage
Pre-MVP. Everything is being built from scratch:

 - Product vision.

 - Strategic roadmap (MVP → PMF → scale).

 - Processes (Scrum, lean discovery, A/B).

 - Team (devs, design, analytics, partners).

 - UX + Go-To-Market.



Final Goal
Become the leader as a “Super App for Everyday Life”: live, eat, travel, and pay from a single app.



Requirements

 - Product leader with a strategy + delivery mindset.

 - Experience in fintech, travel, or food marketplaces.

 - Thinks through MVP, hypotheses, analytics (Amplitude, GA, SQL).

 - Builds from scratch: discovery → launch.

 - Understanding of regulatory frameworks (payments).

 - Strong UX orientation; mobile app launches.

 - White-label integrations / API-first — a strong plus.



Soft Profile

 - A leader who wants to influence, not just “manage”.

 - Team player (founders, devs, design).

 - Resilient under stress (0 → 1).

 - English B2+ (global partners).



What’s next?

If this role sounds like a fit — we’d love to hear from you! Just send over your CV and anything else you’d like us to consider.

We’ll review everything within five working days, and if your background matches what we’re looking for, we’ll get in touch to set up a call and get to know each other better.

Currently, we are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager to join one of toogeza’s clients.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

NICE TO HAVE

source_jobs.title: Head of Debt Instruments
Account Executive
User Acquisition Manager
source_jobs.description:
About product

Memowrite is a web-based platform that helps people turn their life stories into professionally crafted, printed hardcover memoirs — and leave a legacy that outlives them. Users answer guided prompts and add photos, while Memowrite's editorial team shapes it all into a beautifully designed keepsake book that families treasure and pass down for generations. No writing skills required — just the memories worth keeping.

The product is part of Kilo Group (UAB Kilo Grupė) — a Lithuanian digital health and wellness ecosystem, one of the fastest-growing companies in Europe (FT1000 ranking), with 15+ products and 4M+ customers worldwide. Offices in Vilnius, Barcelona and other European cities.

We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, and we may help to find the right ones.

Currently, we are looking for an experienced User Acquisition Manager to join one of toogeza’s clients.

About the Role

We're looking for a User Acquisition Manager to join the Memowrite marketing team. This is a high-impact individual contributor role with a clear path to team leadership. You'll be working with real budgets — $ХM+ month.

We already have unit economics. We're not at the R&D stage — we're scaling. Your job is to make that scaling efficient, measurable and fast.



What You'll Do

 - Manage and scale paid acquisition campaigns primarily on Meta, with expansion to Google Ads and other channels

 - Work in parallel on two streams: creative hypothesis testing (in collaboration with the creative team) and audience/targeting optimization

 - Collaborate closely with the CRO team to improve conversion across the funnel

 - Brief the creative team on hypotheses and contribute to the creative direction — you don't produce creatives, but you know what works and why

 - Track, analyze and report on performance using internal analytics and attribution tools

 - Contribute to evergreen campaign strategy and seasonal activations (Black Friday, Q4)

 - Identify new audience segments and geos for scaling





What We're Looking For

Must Have

 - 2–4+ years of experience in paid user acquisition (Meta — must)

 - Experience managing budgets of $300K+ monthly. You will be working with $1M+ monthly spend.

 - Strong understanding of white-hat verticals — no gambling, no grey niches

 - Hands-on experience with web funnels and subscription-based products

 - Confident working with analytics: Looker Studio, Tableau, Power BI or similar

 - Understanding of attribution models — experience with tools like Northbeam, Triple Whale or similar

 - Experience collaborating with creative and CRO teams

 - Fluent English (working language of the team)

Nice to Have

 - Experience with user acquisition automation and auto-rules is a plus

 - Experience with Google Ads

 - Applovin experience — strong plus

 - Additional European languages (Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese)

 - Experience across multiple geos and audiences



What We Offer

 - $300K–$1M+ monthly budget to manage — real scale from day one

 - Clear path to leadership: this role can grow into leading a media buying team

 - Quarterly performance bonus tied to company results

 - A small, focused, non-toxic team — fast decisions, no bureaucracy

 - Office in Vilnius or Barcelona — or fully remote (GMT+3 preferred)

 - Annual international work retreats

 - Part of Kilo Group ecosystem — strong infrastructure, advanced tooling, senior talent around you



Hiring Process

 1. Screening Interview — toogeza

 2. HM Interview

 3. Test task (3 days)

 4. Bar-raising Interview

 5. Offer

source_jobs.title: Financial Controller
source_jobs.description:
Job Title:



Financial Controller



Department:



Finance Department



Location:



Limassol, Cyprus or remote



Reports To:



Financial Controlling Lead



Job Summary:

 

The Financial Controller will be responsible for overseeing and managing employee cash advances and personal expenses of the UBO. The role ensures accurate tracking, reconciliation, and control of these transactions in compliance with company policies and best practices. In addition to these key responsibilities, the Financial Controller will support the Financial Controlling Lead in monitoring financial processes, enhancing controls, and providing detailed reporting and analysis to maintain operational efficiency and financial integrity.



Key Responsibilities:

 

1. Employee Cash Advances Control

    •         Oversee the issuance, monitoring, and reconciliation of employee cash advances.

    •         Ensure timely settlement and recovery of outstanding advances.

    •         Implement controls to prevent delays, misuse, or irregularities in cash advances.

    •         Maintain detailed and up-to-date records of cash advances for audit and reporting purposes.

    •         Communicate regularly with employees and managers regarding outstanding advances.

 

2. Personal Expenses of UBO

    •         Control and monitor personal expenses of the UBO to ensure accuracy, proper categorization, and timely reconciliation.

    •         Track payments made on behalf of the UBO and maintain a detailed record of transactions.

    •         Prepare regular reports summarizing UBO expenses, highlighting trends and exceptions.

    •         Ensure all expenses comply with company policies and regulatory requirements.

 

3. Reconciliation and Reporting

    •         Prepare and maintain detailed reconciliations for all employee cash advances and UBO personal expenses.

    •         Provide periodic reports to the Financial Controlling Lead and senior management regarding outstanding advances and expenses.

    •         Support month-end and year-end close processes with relevant reconciliations and analysis.

 

4. Financial Controls and Compliance

    •         Implement and maintain internal controls over cash advances, expenses, and reconciliations to minimize risks.

    •         Conduct periodic reviews to ensure compliance with internal policies and financial best practices.

 

6. Budget Monitoring and Analysis

    •         Support the Financial Controlling Lead in monitoring budgets related to advances and personal expenses.

    •         Analyze spending trends and provide actionable recommendations for cost control.

    •         Identify anomalies or irregularities in expenses and escalate for resolution.

 

7. Collaboration and Support

    •         Work closely with accounting, treasury, and administrative teams to ensure smooth cash flow and compliance.

    •         Collaborate with senior management to align UBO-related financial processes with broader financial goals.

    •         Support the Financial Controlling Lead with ad hoc financial analyses or projects.



Key Qualifications and Skills:

 

Education & Certification

    •         Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field.

 

Experience

    •         Minimum 2-3 years of experience in financial controlling, expense management, or a related role.

    •         Experience managing reconciliations, expense controls, and financial reporting processes.

 

Skills

    •         Strong attention to detail and organizational skills to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

    •         Proficiency in financial software, ERP systems, and advanced Excel skills.

    •         Solid understanding of internal controls, reconciliations, and financial compliance.

    •         Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.

    •         Ability to handle sensitive and confidential information with integrity.

 

Langu

source_jobs.title: Senior Corporate Counsel (part-time)
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, we may help to find the right ones.

Currently, we are looking for Senior Corporate Counsel for Elva.

Location: Remote
Job Type: Part-Time




Elva is developing a mobile product in the AI and photo/video space.
We are looking for a Senior Corporate Counsel to provide comprehensive legal support to the business on a part-time basis — an independent specialist who is able to handle tasks and build the company’s legal processes.

The company is registered in Cyprus, and the main legal documentation and communication are conducted in English.




RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - IP: registration and protection of trademarks and naming; transfer of rights from contractors and employees, including work-for-hire and assignment; copyrights to code, design, and content; control over non-infringement of third-party rights.

 - Data Protection: Privacy Policy; compliance with local personal data protection laws; processing of user data and consents; requirements related to underage audiences.

 - Platforms: compliance with App Store and Google Play policies; subscriptions and IAP; possible appeals in case of blocks; payment providers and age ratings.

 - User Documents: ToS, EULA, refund policies, Community Guidelines, cookie policies.

 - Employment Law: hiring and termination of employees; agreements with contractors, including B2B and civil law contracts; stock options / ESOP; NDAs and non-compete agreements.

 - Counterparties: review and support of commercial agreements; NDAs; partnership agreements, B2B, API integrations, and service providers.

 - Licensing: SDKs, libraries, open-source; media, fonts, music; compliance with third-party terms.

 - AI: liability for AI features; data for model training; EU AI Act; disclosure of AI usage.

 - Investments and Deals: funding rounds, including SAFE and term sheets; due diligence; work with investors.

 - Risks: risk assessment of new features and products; liability insurance.



REQUIREMENTS:

 - Higher legal education in international law.

 - Senior level: experience in corporate law, autonomy in decision-making.

 - Experience working with mobile products.

 - Strong expertise in IP, employment, and contract law.

 - Knowledge of personal data protection legislation, including GDPR and analogues.

 - Ability to explain complex matters in simple language.

 - Fluent written and spoken English, as all company legal documentation is conducted in English.



What’s next?
If this role sounds like a fit — we’d love to hear from you! Just send over your CV and anything else you’d like us to consider.

We’ll review everything within five working days, and if your background matches what we’re looking for, we’ll get in touch to set up a call and get to know each other better.

source_jobs.title: User Acquisition Manager (Meta)
Content & Personal Brand Manager
source_jobs.description:
CONTENT & PERSONAL BRAND MANAGER


We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, and we may help to find the right ones.

Currently, we are looking for an experienced Content & Personal Brand Manager.

About the Role

This role is focused on managing and scaling a personal brand across social media, online programs, and digital products.

You will work closely with the founder on day-to-day execution — from content planning and launches to coordinating ongoing initiatives and external contributors.



Who You’ll Work With

You will work directly with an international-level athlete and entrepreneur in the fitness and wellness space — a professional bodybuilding coach, IFBB fitness competitor, and Master of Sports of International Class. Based in Cyprus, the founder is building a personal brand in the fitness and wellness space, combining competitive sports with digital products, online programs, and content-driven initiatives focused on healthy lifestyle, nutrition, and weight management.

Responsibilities


SOCIAL MEDIA & CONTENT:

 - Own and drive social media growth (primarily Instagram)

 - Plan content, generate ideas (Reels, posts, stories), and manage the content calendar

 - Monitor trends, analyze performance, and continuously improve content approach


PERSONAL BRAND & GROWTH:

 - Research and initiate collaborations, partnerships, and ambassador opportunities

 - Communicate with brands and support partnership development

 - Support preparation of presentations and materials

 - Identify relevant events, competitions, and visibility opportunities


DIGITAL PRODUCTS & ONLINE PROGRAMS:

 - Support launching and scaling digital products (online programs, educational initiatives)

 - Assist in structuring program content and user journey

 - Support client acquisition and help organize online program processes

 - Track results, feedback, and help systematize insights

 - Coordinate work with developers and other external specialists


OPERATIONS & COORDINATION:

 - Support coordination of external specialists (coaches, nutritionists, etc.)

 - Help structure and move forward new initiatives and ideas

 - Ensure tasks are tracked, prioritized, and delivered on time
   

Requirements

 - 3+ years of experience in Brand, Marketing, or Social Media roles, with responsibility for brand development and growth

 - Strong understanding of brand strategy, positioning, and audience perception, with the ability to translate this into clear messaging and initiatives

 - Hands-on experience with social media (Instagram as a core platform) and understanding of content formats, trends, and audience engagement principles

 - Experience planning and executing marketing or content initiatives that drive brand awareness and engagement

 - Ability to work with key performance metrics (reach, engagement, growth) and use data to inform decisions and optimize activities

 - Experience conducting market and competitor research, identifying trends, and turning insights into actionable ideas

 - Experience working with cross-functional teams or external contributors and driving initiatives from idea to execution

 - Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple initiatives, prioritize effectively, and ensure delivery

 - Creative thinking combined with a structured, business-oriented mindset and attention to detail

 - High level of ownership, proactivity, and focus on results
   

What You’ll Get

 - Direct collaboration with a high-level international athlete and entrepreneur, with full visibility into how a personal brand is built, scaled, and monetized.

 - Opportunity to shape and build a personal brand strategy from the ground up — this is a new role with real ownership, not a predefined scope

 - Involvement in launching and developing digital products and online programs, not just content ex

source_jobs.title: E-commerce Director
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, we may help to find the right ones.

Currently, we are looking for a Head of eCommerce for our client, a Global Luxury Spirits Brand.


ABOUT OUR CLIENT:

We are an innovative, leading luxury spirits brand with an expanding global presence. Dedicated to creating memorable experiences, we offer exclusive products for discerning customers around the world. We’re seeking a dynamic eCommerce leader to drive our next phase of growth.

Location: London, UK (Remote with occasional UK travel) Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview: As the Head of eCommerce, you’ll strategically lead and manage our global online presence, driving revenue growth through a sophisticated digital experience. Your role involves growing online revenue, shaping omnichannel customer journeys, overseeing website merchandising, managing cross-functional collaboration (internal stakeholders and external contractors), and ensuring alignment with ambitious KPIs.

Key Responsibilities:

Strategic eCommerce Leadership

 - Own and drive global eCommerce revenue and profitability targets with a strong revenue-growth orientation.

 - Develop and execute strategic plans for customer acquisition, retention, and loyalty, tailored to luxury consumers.

Digital Customer Experience

 - Lead continuous improvement of the online customer experience, emphasizing high-end storytelling, personalization, seamless UX/UI, and omnichannel experiences that bridge online and offline presences.

 - Oversee exclusive launches, gifting strategies, tailored customer segmentation, and effective website merchandising to double down on Average Order Value (AOV).

Performance Analytics and KPIs

 - Set, monitor, and optimize KPIs (CAC, LTV, AOV, Conversion Rates).

 - Utilize heavy analytics and conversion rate optimization (CRO) to translate data into actionable insights, informing strategic and operational decisions.

CRM and Retention Strategy

 - Design and manage email/SMS marketing, retention programs, and post-purchase engagement.

 - Implement customer segmentation strategies to nurture collectors, corporate clients, and gifting customers.

Marketing Collaboration

 - Guide external partners in paid media, influencer, content, and SEO strategies to maximize ROI.

 - Ensure marketing initiatives align with brand values, campaign messaging, and performance targets.

Cross-Functional & External Team Management

 - Lead coordination between internal stakeholders and a global network of contractors and agencies.

 - Establish clear KPIs, ensuring accountability, quality, and timely delivery across all external partnerships.

Compliance and Market Adaptation

 - Ensure all digital initiatives comply with global alcohol marketing regulations.

 - Oversee region-specific adaptations, addressing local payment, language, and cultural preferences.

Requirements:

 - 5+ years’ experience in strategic eCommerce leadership within luxury or premium consumer brands.

 - Proven success managing external contractors and agencies, with robust KPI-driven management.

 - Data-driven professional with strong analytical capabilities, heavy analytics skills, and proven CRO expertise.

 - Expertise in premium consumer marketing, segmentation, and retention strategies.

 - Exceptional organizational and communication skills, adept at collaborating cross-functionally.

 - Experience or familiarity with regulated industries (alcohol/spirits) is preferred.

What We Offer:

 - Opportunity to lead digital strategy for a rapidly scaling luxury spirits brand.

 - Competitive compensation with performance incentives.

 - Flexible work arrangements in a dynamic, entrepreneurial environment.

 - A collaborative culture focused on innovation, excellence, and growth.

If you’re passionate about luxury branding, strategic digital growth, and performance-

Currently, we are looking for a Junior Quantitative Researcher for Machine Factor Technologies.






ABOUT THE CLIENT:

Machine Factor Technologies is a regulated, market-neutral, multi-strategy algorithmic trading fund operating in the digital assets space. We trade across both CeFi and DeFi markets—spot and futures—leveraging a blend of traditional finance rigor and cutting-edge crypto innovation.



Role Summary:
As a Junior Quantitative Researcher, you’ll partner with our investment team to develop and evaluate crypto‐focused quantitative strategies. You’ll analyze latency‐optimization logs, back-test models in live environments, and deliver data-driven feedback to refine our trading signals. This role is modelled on Citadel’s Quantitative Researcher framework, emphasizing rigorous research, statistical analysis, and rapid implementation of algorithms into code.



Key Responsibilities:

 - Conduct quantitative research on crypto markets and evaluate strategy performance.

 - Analyze large datasets and latency logs to identify bottlenecks and optimize trade execution.

 - Conceptualize and continuously refine mathematical models; translate algorithms into production-ready Python/Pandas code.

 - Back-test and implement trading signals in a live environment, monitoring real-time performance.

 - Collaborate with traders, engineers, and data teams to integrate findings and improve strategy robustness.



Skills & Preferred Qualifications:

 - 1–3 years’ experience in computer science, machine learning, or a similarly quantitative field.

 - Deep proficiency in Python and Pandas for data manipulation and analysis.

 - Strong foundation in statistics and mathematics (e.g., probability, time-series analysis, hypothesis testing).

 - Prior exposure to data-driven research or ML model development.

 - STEM background (e.g., CS, Math, Engineering) is preferred.

 - Knowledge of finance or digital-asset markets is appreciated but not required.

 - Familiarity with unconventional data sources, version control, and automated testing frameworks.



Compensation & Benefits:

 - Discretionary year-end trading bonus.

 - Opportunities for professional growth in an innovative trading environment.
   
   

Interview Process:

 - HR Screening: 30-minute introductory call

 - Take-Home Test: Quantitative and coding task (3–5 days’ turnaround).

 - Technical Interview: 1–2 hour deep dive into your research, coding, and statistical approach.

 - Culture Fit Interview: 1 hour with Senior Team Members to assess collaboration style and values.



What’s next?

If this role sounds like a fit — we’d love to hear from you! Just send over your CV and anything else you’d like us to consider.

We’ll review everything within five working days, and if your background matches what we’re looking for, we’ll get in touch to set up a call and get to know each other better.

source_jobs.title: Treasury and Payments Manager (FinTech/PSP)
source_jobs.description:
Ми — toogeza, українська рекрутингова компанія, яка допомагає технологічним стартапам знаходити сильних людей і будувати команди.

Зараз шукаємо Treasury and Payments Manager для нового фінтех-проєкту, який будується з нуля.

Це можливість зайти в проєкт на старті та фактично побудувати казначейську функцію з нуля: від процесів і фінансової моделі до роботи з платіжними потоками та маржинальністю.



ПРО РОЛЬ

Ти відповідатимеш за всі treasury-процеси: ліквідність, платежі, розрахунки з провайдерами та оптимізацію фінансових потоків.

Важливо: це hands-on роль без команди на старті, де потрібна людина, яка не чекає задач, а приходить із рішеннями і сама будує процеси.

Проєкт — це платіжна інфраструктура (PSP), орієнтована на міжнародні ринки (включно з Tier-3), з активною роботою з криптою та класичними платіжними системами.



ЩО ТИ БУДЕШ РОБИТИ

 - управляти ліквідністю та всіма платіжними потоками (fiat + crypto)

 - виконувати платежі через банки, EMI та криптопровайдерів

 - працювати з мерчантами та провайдерами (операційні та фінансові питання)

 - розраховувати та контролювати settlement-и і комісії

 - знаходити найефективніші маршрути платежів і можливості для збільшення маржі

 - працювати з FX-операціями та валютними ризиками

 - робити звітність (daily / weekly / monthly)

 - проводити реконсиляцію з банками та PSP

 - вирішувати кейси, пов’язані з AML, фродом і блокуваннями

 - брати участь у побудові фінансової моделі та процесів з нуля



ЩО ВАЖЛИВО

 - 3–5+ років досвіду в Treasury / FinTech / PSP / Payments

 - досвід роботи з платіжними потоками, settlement-ами, комісіями

 - реальний hands-on досвід з криптопровайдерами

 - розуміння банківської інфраструктури та платіжних схем

 - досвід роботи з Tier-3 ринками або high-risk сегментами буде плюсом

 - сильний Excel / Google Sheets (формули, півоти, моделі)

 - англійська Upper-Intermediate+


Якщо ця роль вам відгукується — будемо раді познайомитися! Надсилайте, будь ласка, своє резюме.

Ми розглянемо вашу заявку протягом п’яти робочих днів і, якщо ваш досвід відповідатиме тому, що ми шукаємо, зв’яжемося з вами, щоб домовитися про дзвінок і ближче познайомитися.

source_jobs.title: VP of User Acquisition
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, and we may help to find the right ones.

Currently, we are looking for an experienced VP of User Acquisition to join one of Toogeza’s clients.





WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Define the vision and strategy for User Acquisition at the company.

 - Lead both Paid and Organic User Acquisition, managing and optimizing mobile performance marketing across key platforms and stores: App Store, Google Play, Meta, Snapchat, TikTok, etc.

 - Own an 8-figure UA budget, driving user and revenue growth while balancing efficiency metrics (e.g., LTV:CAC) and scaling installs sustainably.

 - Oversee reporting and analytics for UA and marketing performance, ensuring clear visibility and decision-making.

 - Build and run test plans and experimentation across UA initiatives to identify the highest-impact growth opportunities.

 - Optimize and report campaign performance across multiple ad networks, continuously improving creatives, targeting, and funnels.

 - Drive growth initiatives in ASO, re-engagement, and other organic levers (incl. SEO/referrals where applicable).

 - Lead the team in designing and improving internal tools and processes for more efficient UA execution and learning loops.

 - Work closely with Product teams to ensure strong funnel conversion and maximize value from each acquisition channel.

 - Partner with internal stakeholders (Finance, Legal, People) to support growth plans and operational needs.

 - Manage external partners: ad networks and vendors; collaborate with creative and other teams to develop high-performing ad assets and supporting materials.

 - Lead and grow a high-performing team of 20 specialists across Paid and Organic UA.
   
   


WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

 - A clear UA strategy and operating model that scales acquisition across channels while maintaining efficiency (LTV:CAC).

 - Consistent, measurable growth in users and revenue, supported by structured testing and repeatable learnings.

 - Reliable reporting and analytics that enable fast decision-making and predictable performance.

 - Strong cross-functional collaboration with Product, leading to improved funnel conversion and better payback.

 - A well-structured, motivated UA org with strong processes, tools, and execution standards across Paid + Organic.
   
   


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 8+ years in digital marketing / user acquisition (primarily mobile apps), including 2+ years in leadership roles.

 - Deep expertise in the mobile UA landscape, mobile analytics, and attribution.

 - Proven ability to grow and amplify organic acquisition using ASO, SEO, referral strategies, and re-engagement approaches.

 - Strong analytics skillset and fluency with visualization / reporting tools (e.g., Looker) and Excel.

 - Experience successfully managing large marketing budgets across multiple performance channels.

 - Strong data-driven mindset: able to turn analysis into decisions, recommendations, and outcomes.

 - Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills: comfortable promoting, defending, and negotiating new ideas.
   
   


WHAT’S NEXT?

If this role sounds like a fit we’d love to hear from you! Just send over your CV and anything else you’d like us to consider.

We’ll review everything within five working days, and if your background matches what we’re looking for, we’ll get in touch to set up a call and get to know each other better.

source_jobs.title: Lead Data Scientist
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, we may help to find the right ones.

Currently, we are looking for a Lead Data Scientist for SpinLab.

Location: Remote
Job Type: Full-Time




ABOUT OUR CLIENT:


Spinlab helps slot gaming leaders unlock the potential of their data, enhancing business outcomes and strengthening their competitive edge in the market. The company collects and processes data using advanced methods and technologies to provide clients with clear, actionable recommendations based on real metrics. SpinLab’s goal is not just to collect data but to help businesses use it for maximum efficiency and amplify their performance results.




Role Overview:

As a Lead Data Scientist, you will combine hands-on expertise, technical leadership, and product thinking to drive the development of scalable ML solutions.

You will play a key role in:

 - Ensuring what we build drives business value

 - Defining how we build (processes, standards, scalability, performance)

This role requires close collaboration with product and business stakeholders to translate complex problems into practical, high-impact solutions.




Responsibilities:

 - Work closely with product and business teams to:
   
   - Translate business problems into data science solutions or data analytics researches
   
   - Define clear success metrics and KPIs
   
   - Turn insights into actionable recommendations that impact revenue and player behavior
   
   - Ensure all models and analyses are aligned with real business outcomes, not just technical performance
   
   - Design, build, and deploy ML models (e.g., churn prediction, LTV forecasting, revenue uplift, player segmentation) from experimentation to production.

 - Define and implement standardized, scalable DS/DA processes across the team:

 - Model development lifecycle (design → validation → production)

 - Code quality, documentation, and reproducibility

 - Experimentation and evaluation frameworks

 - Continuously improve delivery efficiency, reducing time from idea → production

 - Identify opportunities to automate manual analytical workflows using AI/ML



Requirements:

 - Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science,Economics, or a related quantitative field.

 - 5+ years of experience as a Senior Data Scientist role/Lead role, leading both analytical and data science domain work.

 - Strong SQL and Python skills; experience with large datasets, notebooks, reproducible analysis, and Git-based workflows.

 - Solid knowledge of ML, statistics, experimental design, A/B testing, holdout evaluation, and business KPI analysis.

 - Commercial experience with predictive modeling, classification, segmentation,forecasting, model evaluation, and business impact measurement.

 - Experience with churn, uplift, LTV, retention, campaign analytics, or user behaviormodeling is a strong advantage.

 - Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset; ability to find the story in the data:uncovering trends and explaining them in clear business terms.

 - Commercial Experience working with large datasets and distributed computing tools(BigQuery, Spark, Hive, or similar).

 - Solid understanding of experimental design and statistical testing (A/B testing,hypothesis testing, confidence intervals).

 - Familiarity with causal inference techniques (e.g., Propensity Score Matching, Instrumental Variables, Difference-in-Differences, uplift modeling), and predictivemodeling techniques.

 - English B2+



Will be a plus:

 - Experience in gaming, gambling, fintech, e-commerce, subscription, or other user-behavior-driven products.

 - Experience with BI tools such as Tableau, Looker, or Power BI.

 - Product mindset: the ability to go beyond numbers and propose actionable solutionsthat make an impact.



Benefits:

 - Work on meaningful data products and shape the

source_jobs.title: AI Video Agent Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, we may help to find the right ones.

Currently, we are looking for AI Video Agent Engineer for Elva.

Location: Remote
Job Type: Full-Time





OVERVIEW:

We are building an AI-driven video production system designed as an intelligent multi-agent orchestration layer capable of transforming raw ideas and references into fully structured video content.

The system operates as a black-box creative engine for different types of users:

 - professional video creators

 - casual users

 - creators of short narrative concepts

Users provide an idea, references, or media fragments, and the system automatically orchestrates multiple AI agents responsible for analysis, scripting, editing, and production of video content.

We are looking for an engineer who can design and implement multi-agent pipelines, orchestrate AI tools, and build intelligent workflows that combine video analysis, storytelling logic, and automated editing.

This role sits at the intersection of AI systems architecture, creative tooling, and multimodal content generation.




RESPONSIBILITIES:

AI Agent Architecture

Design and implement the architecture of a multi-agent video editing system including agents responsible for:

 - video analysis

 - narrative generation

 - editing orchestration

 - production and output synthesis

Define system prompts, behavioral rules, and structured instructions for agents interacting within the pipeline.

Pipeline Orchestration (n8n)

Develop and maintain complex orchestration pipelines in n8n, including:

 - multi-agent workflows

 - tool-calling logic

 - dynamic routing between tools and models

 - context passing between agents

Pipelines must be capable of selecting the most appropriate models, tools, and strategies depending on the task.

Multimodal Data Processing

Design robust pipelines for handling:

 - video materials

 - image assets

 - user text prompts

 - structured metadata

Ensure proper data transformation and context transfer across the pipeline stages.

Tool & API Integration

Integrate both external and internal APIs for multimodal generation and processing, including:

 - image generation

 - video generation

 - speech synthesis

 - audio generation

 - video processing services

Rapidly evaluate available APIs and select the best quality tools and models for each task.

Model Orchestration & Optimization

Tune and optimize model interactions, primarily based on Gemini models, including:

 - prompt engineering

 - structured outputs

 - tool-calling workflows

 - agent collaboration logic

Optimize pipelines for quality, reliability, and execution efficiency.

Future Architecture (RAG & Knowledge Systems)

Design systems that support:

 - vector databases

 - retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)

 - memory and contextual reasoning between agents


EXPECTED OUTCOMES:

The pipeline system should be capable of:

 1. Taking an idea + references as input

 2. Analyzing the content

 3. Generating a coherent narrative structure

 4. Selecting appropriate visual and audio elements

 5. Producing a high-quality, structured video output



REQUIREMENTS:

AI Systems & Agent Architecture

Strong experience building multi-agent systems, including:

 - intent and sub-intent modeling

 - agent orchestration

 - agent communication and transport layers

 - summarization pipelines

 - context passing between agents

Workflow Orchestration

Hands-on experience with:

 - n8n

 - Agent tool-calling

 - n8n MCP

Experience designing complex automation pipelines is essential.

Programming

Strong practical coding skills with vibe coding mindset:

Primary languages:

 - Python

 - JavaScript

Bonus experience:

 - ComfyUI custom nodes

 - lightweight APIs (e.g., HuggingFace Spaces or inference endpoints)

Multimodal Tooling Knowledge

Ability to quickly navigat

source_jobs.title: Operations and Project Coordinator
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, we may help to find the right ones.

We are looking for an Operations and Project Coordinator to lead both internal and external projects at Roosh, a Ukrainian company that creates and invests in AI and ML-focused projects.

This role focuses on operational excellence and hands-on project coordination, ensuring all initiatives are well-structured, well-managed, and effectively executed.



Key Responsibilities

 - Project Tracking: Monitor daily/weekly progress, maintain project schedules, and provide detailed status presentations to stakeholders. Surface blockers early and push for resolution.

 - Meeting & Communication Facilitation: Set up and prepare meetings, capture decisions and action items, and drive follow-through. Manage and support communications with partners, vendors, and internal stakeholders.

 - Documentation & Administration: Coordinate contractual processes, including agreements, documentation, and follow-ups. Support and monitor payment processes related to projects (in collaboration with Finance and Legal)

 - Resource Coordination: Liaise with team members and vendors to ensure the necessary equipment, materials, and resources are available on time.

 - Risk & Issue Management: Ensure proper documentation, reporting, and tracking of all initiatives. Identify risks, gaps, and inefficiencies, and proactively suggest improvements


Essential Qualifications & Skills

 - At least 3 years of proven experience in project management or coordinating complex, cross-functional projects.

 - Organization & Multitasking: Excellent time management capabilities with a proven ability to handle multiple workflows and deadlines simultaneously. Strong operational mindset with attention to detail and follow-through.

 - A self-starter. Given ambiguous direction, you come back with a plan and a first draft, not a list of questions.

 - Communication Skills: Strong verbal and written communication to effectively act as a central liaison between team members and management.

 - Software Proficiency: Familiarity with project management tools (such as Jira) and general office software.

 - Strong PowerPoint and Excel. You can build a clean steering deck and a working project tracker without hand-holding.
   
   As a Rooshmate, you will have:

— The coolest team ever

You will join striving and open-minded professionals to share ideas and shape the future.

— Time-off policy to take your time

Twenty-one days of vacation, long and short-term sick leaves, compensatory days off, maternity and paternity leaves, and more — everything for you to make up your life according to your needs.

— Medical insurance

Perfectly packed health care covering dental and Covid-19 cases.

— Boosting your expertise

We’re interested in accelerating your growth — hence we compensate for your professional development courses and conferences. You will get access to all Roosh educational or business activities, where we engage top-notch experts from diverse areas to master hard and soft skills.

We’ll review everything within five working days, and if your background matches what we’re looking for, we’ll get in touch to set up a call and get to know each other better.

source_jobs.title: Executive Assistant
source_jobs.description:
WE ARE TOOGEZA, A UKRAINIAN RECRUITING COMPANY THAT IS FOCUSED ON HIRING TALENTS AND BUILDING TEAMS FOR TECH STARTUPS WORLDWIDE. PEOPLE MAKE A DIFFERENCE IN THE BIG GAME, AND WE MAY HELP TO FIND THE RIGHT ONES.

Currently, we are looking for an experienced Executive Assistant to join one of Toogeza’s clients.

Responsibilities:

 - Serve as the main point of contact for the CEO, COO, and other senior executives, as well as external stakeholders.

 - Manage internal documentation and data storage for the company (upon request).

 - Arrange travel and accommodation for the management team.

 - Oversee and organize the management team's calendars, including scheduling appointments and prioritizing urgent matters.

Requirements:

 - Proactive problem-solving approach with solid decision-making skills.

 - Proficient in computer tools (Google Drive, Google Calendar, MS Office: Excel, Word, PowerPoint).

 - Flexibility and a willingness to learn and grow professionally.

 - Previous experience as an executive assistant is a competitive advantage.

We Offer:

source_jobs.title: Lead Generation Specialist
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, and we may help to find the right ones.

Currently, we are looking for an experienced Lead Generation Specialist to join one of toogeza’s clients.




RESPONSIBILITIES:

— Launch and manage outbound campaigns (email + LinkedIn)
— Operate and maintain automation tools (HubSpot, Reply.io http://Reply.io, and related tools)

source_jobs.title: Talent Acqusition Specialist
source_jobs.description:
Ми — toogeza, українська рекрутингова компанія, яка спеціалізується на пошуку талантів та створенні команд для технологічних стартапів по всьому світу. Люди відіграють важливу роль у великій грі, і ми можемо допомогти знайти саме тих, хто потрібен.



Зараз ми в пошуку Talent Acquisition Specialist для expla.

Локація: Україна, Київ, гібрид.



expla https://expla.com - performance marketing компанія, що з 2015 року розвиває ІТ-бізнеси партнерів з усього світу.



expla за час свого розвитку:

✔️входить до 100 найбільших клієнтів Google в Європі;

✔️залучила 60 млн користувачів для рекламодавців;

✔️є найбільшим постачальником трафіку для рекламодавців в Tier 1-країнах.

Компанія є топ-роботодавцем на DOU з задоволеністю умовами роботи в компанії 99 зі 100, найкращим місцем роботи для молодих талантів в рейтингу StudPoint.

У них працюють сильні люди, і expla завжди в пошуку нових талантів!

Тому шукаємо підсилення в напрямок рекрутингу в ролі Talent Acquisition Specialist.

Тут ти зможеш напряму впливати на свій результат, взаємодіяти з С-левел компанії, будувати ефективні воронки, активно сорсити на актуальні позиції та створювати пасивний нетворк з крутих кандидатів.

Що ти будеш робити:

 - керувати повним циклом рекрутингу, від розміщення вакансії до пре-бордингу;

 - активно знаходити кандидатів за допомогою різних каналів сорсингу, формувати кандидатські пули (включаючи пасивних кандидатів);

 - оцінювати та покращувати ефективність процесів та воронок;

 - співпрацювати з хайрінг-менеджерами з питань найму та ефективнішого закриття вакансій;

 - тісно співпрацювати з employer brand командою по зовнішнім комунікаціям з кандидатами, ініціативах для залучення кандидатів.

Ми очікуємо:

 - 2+ роки успішного досвіду закриття вакансій в маркетингових, продуктових компаніях, рекрутинг агенціях;

 - дата-дрівен майндсет;

 - досвід активного сорсингу, креативного залучення нових кандидатів та утримання пасивних кандидатів;

 - орієнтація на бізнес-результати;

 - навички аргументації, конструктивної комунікації;

 - вміння якісно оцінювати кандидатів.

Що ти отримуєш?


Wellbeing

 - Оплата в $, робота в стабільній компанії, що працює на закордонних ринках.

 - 20 днів відпустки + за кожен рік роботи у компанії кількість вихідних збільшується ще на один. Довше працюєш, більше відпочиваєш)

 - 100% компенсація безлімітних лікарняних, медичне страхування.

 - Компенсація профільного навчання та мовних курсів.

 - Компенсація послуг психолога.

 - Pet-friendly офіси в Києві та Варшаві.

 - Гнучкий графік роботи без відстежень.

 - Сніданки, обіди, фрукти та снеки для всіх співробітників.

 - Наша support-team допоможе з адаптацією та зробить твій шлях в expla максимально комфортним.



Social Responsibility

 - відмінна репутація бренду роботодавця — це підтверджують відгуки співробітників, оцінки та позиції у рейтингах.

 - ми підтримуємо притулки з тваринками Київської області, та час від часу влаштовуємо командні поїздки туди. Щоб попрацювати, нагладитись та наобійматися.

 - expla не співпрацює з ринком рф та рб, але почала співпрацювати з артилерією ЗСУ! Кожного місяця донатимо на потреби Збройних Сил України, й реалізували декілька масштабних проєктів для наближення Перемоги. speka.media/... -dlya-artileristiv-9g23q2 http://speka.media/...-dlya-artileristiv-9g23q2



Що далі?

 - Інтервʼю з рекрутеркою toogeza — 45 хв

 - Інтервʼю з HRD

 - Тестове завдання (3-4 год)

 - Фінальне інтервʼю

Дякуємо за твій інтерес! У разі отримання твоєї заявки ми розглянемо її протягом п’яти робочих днів. Якщо вона відповідає вимогам вакансії, ми організуємо дзвінок і будемо раді познайомитися ближче. В іншому випадку, ми будемо раді залишатися на зв’язку.

source_jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Opportunity Description
This is an opportunity to join a data-rich technology leader with a combined audience of hundreds of millions of players worldwide. We’re building an Ad Network, leveraging best-in-class industry solutions to unite supply and demand intelligently in underserved digital
segments.



Our platform is powered by unique access to rich first-party user data derived from
our massive owned audience, which gives us an undeniable edge in delivering superior user
profiling and higher-performing campaigns.


We are initially focused on dominating the high-value iGaming vertical, leveraging this data advantage, with a clear strategic goal of rapidly scaling into other lucrative segments, such as Forex and beyond. You’ll work alongside a leadership team with deep experience from top big tech companies and industry-leading ad platforms, stepping into a pivotal role that offers the chance to define the foundational architecture and deliver immediate, massive impact on a globally scaled product.

What You’ll be doing
● Design, implement, and maintain high-performance CTR and CVR prediction models that power ad ranking and recommendation systems.
● Build and refine systems for creative understanding and user behaviour modelling, enabling more accurate and context-aware engagement predictions.
● Responsible for model quality and reliability by monitoring performance, calibrating predictions, and proactively addressing data drift and delayed feedback.
● Clearly communicate complex technical concepts to non-engineering stakeholders in an accessible, outcome-focused way.

What we’re looking for
● An MS or PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Statistics, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
● Over 3 years of hands-on experience developing and operating large-scale ad delivery and optimization systems.
● Experience working with CTR/CVR modeling, creative or content understanding, or user behavior modeling.
● Strong proficiency in general-purpose programming languages such as Python, Go, Scala, C++, or similar.
● A solid grasp of metric design, experimentation methodologies like A/B testing, and large-scale data processing and analysis

source_jobs.title: Executive Assistant
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, and we may help to find the right ones.



Currently, we are looking for an experienced Executive Assistant to join one of Toogeza’s clients.



Responsibilities:

 - Oversee and thoughtfully manage the COO’s calendar, priorities, and daily schedule

 - Proactively monitor the execution of the schedule and promptly adjust the plans as required in response to any changes.

 - Manage stakeholder communication and follow-ups.

 - Prepare meeting agendas, take notes, track action items.

 - Assist in producing management reports and presentations.

 - Support light project coordination and process improvements.

 - Arrange travel when required.

 - In a fast-paced environment, manage personal errands and urgent matters.

 - Maintain internal documentation upon request.

 - Perform other duties as assigned.
   


Requirements:

 - Advanced English.

 - Strong stakeholder communication skills.

 - High digital literacy.

 - Comfortable working with common digital tools and using AI (e.g., ChatGPT) to support daily tasks.

 - Ability to understand business context and tech terminology.

 - Proactive mindset.

 - Strong organizational skills.

 - Based in Kyiv and willing to work from the office.

 - EA experience is a plus.
   


We Offer:

 - Competitive compensation.

 - Health insurance.

 - A dynamic working environment.

 - Direct collaboration with top management.

 - Opportunity to grow within the organization.


What’s next?
If this role sounds like a fit — we’d love to hear from you! Just send over your CV and anything else you’d like us to consider.

We’ll review everything within five working days, and if your background matches what we’re looking for, we’ll get in touch to set up a call and get to know each other better.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer (Distributed Systems)
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide.

Currently, we are looking for a Senior Software Engineer (Distributed Systems) for Spinlab.

Location: Remote
Job Type: Full-Time

About our client
We help slot gaming leaders unlock the potential of their data, enhancing business outcomes and strengthening their competitive edge in the market. We collect and process data using advanced methods and technologies to provide our clients with clear, actionable recommendations based on real metrics. SpinLab's goal is not just to collect data but to transform it into meaningful business insights that improve efficiency and help products grow.

Product Overview

A B2B web analytics and user-identification platform for browsers and webviews. High RPS, real-time event processing, and an analytics database powering customer-facing reporting. This role requires close collaboration with product and business stakeholders to translate requirements into practical solutions.

Role Overview

This role requires close collaboration with product and business stakeholders to translate requirements into practical solutions. The vast majority of your work will be backend - building and owning production-ready services in a high-load distributed system, but you will also pick up the front-end work, a feature needs to ship end-to-end.

Our problem statement is not straightforward, as we aim to achieve high-end results in all important technical aspects of our business:

 - best availability,

 - lowest latency in every micro-service,

 - the most efficient resource usage.

If you're a product-passionate person, your mind is keen to solve deep tech engineering problems, you have a fast "PoC first" approach with a deep sense of ownership, and you're happy to reach into the UI when needed, we would love to hear from you.


Requirements:

 - Solid backend experience with Node.js/TypeScriptStrong understanding of Async approaches

 - Experience with Messaging systems like Kafka, RabbitMQ

 - Experience in distributed systems

 - Experience with RDBMs (MySQL, PostgreSQL etc.), CDBMs (Redshift, ClickHouse, etc.), NoSQL (DynamoDB, MongoDB, etc)

 - Experience in writing e2e & unit tests

 - Experience with the development of production-ready solutions

 - Basic front-end ability: comfortable with HTML/CSS/JS, TypeScript, and common UI framework (React/Vue) — able to read existing UI code, make changes, and connect a UI to backend APIs

 - A "whole feature" mindset — willingness to own delivery end-to-end, including the UI, rather than handing it off


Would be beneficial to know:

 - Understanding of enterprise development patterns

 - Experienced with large-scale microservices architecture

 - Experience with cloud providers (AWS, GCP, etc.)

 - Experience with Kubernetes

 - Active performance observation

 - Understanding of application security and industry standards, its best practices

 - A degree in Computer Science or related field
   

Scope of ownership:

 - Backend: high-RPS collection and identification endpoints, a Redis-backed key-value store, Kafka producers, ClickHouse migrations

 - Browser SDK: evolving signals and fighting regressions on Safari and iOS.

 - Operations: observability (APM, RED signals, SLO alerts), GitOps delivery via Helm and ArgoCD.

 - A "whole feature" mindset — willingness to own delivery end-to-end, including the UI, rather than handing it off



Benefits:

 - Work on meaningful data products and shape them with your vision.

 - 25 vacation days + 15 sick days + 1 birthday leave.

 - Budget for English classes.

 - Budget for health insurance.

 - Annual education & development budget.

 - Remote-friendly culture with a small, dedicated team.

source_jobs.title: Head of Private Office
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a recruiting company specializing in finding talent and building teams for IT companies around the world. People make a difference in the big game — and we can help you find the right ones.

We are currently looking for a Head of Private Office to oversee the day-to-day coordination of the private office support operations and household ecosystem of a High-Net-Worth Individual and their family.

This role combines executive operations, team management, and high-level administrative oversight in a fast-paced UHNW environment. The successful candidate will act as a central coordination point between the individual and family members, personal assistants, household leadership, external vendors, and service providers, ensuring seamless execution across all areas of private and household operations.

The position requires exceptional organizational skills, emotional intelligence, operational ownership, and the ability to manage multiple priorities with absolute confidentiality and professionalism.


Location: Limassol, Cyprus
Employment Type: Full-time, on-site


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:


EXECUTIVE & PRIVATE OFFICE OPERATIONS

 - Oversee the work of Personal Assistants supporting the individual and family members, ensuring smooth coordination across private office activities.

 - Establish and improve workflows, communication standards, planning routines, and follow-up processes within the private office environment.

 - Ensure clear ownership, accountability, and timely execution across tasks handled by the PA team.

 - Provide operational oversight and step in when escalation, additional coordination, or quality control is required.

 - Ensure smooth information flow between the individual, family members, Personal Assistants, and relevant stakeholders.


HOUSEHOLD & LIFESTYLE OPERATIONS

 - Oversee household operations and personal staff coordination, ensuring clear responsibilities and high service standards.

 - Coordinate household-related processes, including maintenance, repairs, logistics, service providers, and day-to-day operational needs.

 - Maintain visibility over residences, personal assets, and property-related matters where required.

 - Support coordination of property-related projects when needed, including communication between architects, designers, contractors, finance, and relevant stakeholders.

 - Support the coordination of private events, travel-related lifestyle needs, and other personal requests through the responsible team members.

 - Manage relationships with luxury service providers, contractors, concierge partners, and other external vendors.


TEAM MANAGEMENT & LEADERSHIP

 - Lead, mentor, and support a team of Personal Assistants and key personal support staff.

 - Assess the current team structure, identify gaps, and suggest improvements in responsibilities, performance, or development areas.

 - Set and maintain high standards of communication, discretion, service quality, attention to detail, and execution across the team.

 - Coach team members on service standards, proactive communication, and appropriate interaction within a private household environment.

 - Participate in hiring, onboarding, feedback, performance management, and staff-related processes when required.

 - Maintain a respectful, service-oriented, and discreet working culture.


OPERATIONAL EXCELLENCE

 - Identify opportunities to improve systems, procedures, and control mechanisms across private office and household operations.

 - Support budget visibility, expense control, vendor invoice review, and approval processes in cooperation with the finance team.

 - Coordinate with finance, legal, HR, and security teams on private office and household-related matters when required.

 - Identify gaps in ownership, communication, or execution and help resolve them proactively.

 - Maintain strict confidentiality and handle sensitive matters with professionalism, discretion, empathy, and sound judgment.


REQUIREMENT

source_jobs.title: Product Owner
source_jobs.description:
We’re building a new fintech product from the ground up, focused on PSP and wallet infrastructure, and are looking for a strong Chief Product Officer to lead this initiative from concept to launch.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own the fintech product direction end to end, from concept and roadmap to launch and further scaling

 - Define the launch strategy for a new PSP product, including product scope, implementation approach, and rollout priorities

 - Build and defend a realistic roadmap for product launch, with a strong focus on execution speed and business impact

 - Lead product setup from zero, whether through building the solution internally or adapting an existing product for target markets

 - Prioritize features and initiatives based on commercial impact, payment conversion, and operational value

 - Drive key payment performance metrics, including approval rate, routing, and cascading logic

 - Optimize checkout flows, reduce payment friction, and improve conversion across different GEOs

 - Work closely with external partners, including PSPs, banks, and antifraud providers

 - Translate business needs into clear product requirements and structured tasks for delivery teams

 - Build and lead a cross-functional team across Product, Analytics, UX/UI, Payments, and Operations

 - Shape the operational setup around the product, including controls, processes, ownership, and collaboration with finance

 - Navigate ambiguity, remove blockers, and drive product execution in a complex cross-functional environment


REQUIREMENTS

 - 3+ years of experience in fintech

 - Proven experience launching a fintech or payment product from scratch

 - Strong understanding of payment performance and transaction optimization, including approval rate (AR), routing, and cascading logic

 - Strong understanding of checkout experience and conversion improvement, including user flow design, friction reduction, and payment step optimization

 - Solid understanding of compliance and GEO adaptation, including KYC / AML requirements and localization of payment journeys for different markets

 - Experience working with external partners such as PSPs, banks, and antifraud providers

 - Experience building launch roadmaps and leading product rollout from zero

 - Experience managing teams of around 15 people

 - Strong leadership and ownership mindset

 - Strong resilience and ability to achieve results despite pushback, uncertainty, or limited structure

 - English level: B2+

 - Hands-on experience with Atlassian, Grafana, and Tableau


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience working with Tier-3 markets

 - Experience in high-risk fintech or payment environments

 - Experience building or adapting PSP, wallet, checkout, or antifraud products

What’s next?

If this role sounds like a fit — we’d love to hear from you! Just send over your CV and anything else you’d like us to consider.

We’ll review everything within five working days, and if your background matches what we’re looking for, we’ll get in touch to set up a call and get to know each other better.

source_jobs.title: Creative Marketing Lead
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide.

Currently, we are looking for a Creative Marketing Lead for nove8.

Location: Remote
Job Type: Full-Time

About our client
nove8 is a young tech company focused on mobile apps, from pet care to lifestyle. They build products that help people live, work, and connect in meaningful ways.
Today, we explore new directions, experiment, and create meaningful digital experiences for people around the world.

About the role
We are looking for a Creative Marketing Lead to own the creative direction and drive growth for our main product, Woofz. You will be responsible for building scalable creative systems, launching and testing new funnels and angles, and developing a high-performing team of Creative Marketing Managers.


What You’ll Do

 - Own the creative strategy across paid acquisition (Meta, Google, TikTok) — hooks, formats, narratives, visual language — and drive the creative roadmap end-to-end.

 - Build scalable, documented creative production processes from brief to launch (ideation → production → testing → iteration).

 - Design and prioritize a high-volume hypothesis backlog; run structured creative experiments and translate results into decisions.

 - Conduct deep competitor and trend research; source and analyze organic content for winning angles and adapt them to paid formats.

 - Launch new funnels and product angles from scratch; define the creative playbook for new verticals.

 - Work closely with a cross-functional team to drive growth and achieve business objectives.

 - Hire, onboard, and develop Creative Marketing Managers.


What We’re Looking For

 - 3+ years as Creative Marketing Manager / Creative Producer / Creative Strategist in subscription B2C apps.

 - Hands-on experience across multiple ad platforms (Meta, Google, TikTok etc).

 - Deep understanding of digital marketing, paid social, and creative trends.

 - Strong analytical skills and data-driven decision-making.

 - Experience working with web funnels — you understand how creative, landing page, and offer work together.

 - Leadership: ability to set vision, build process, raise standards, develop people.

 - Hands-on experience with AI creative tools.

 - Upper-Intermediate English or higher.
   

Personal qualities

 - Strong analytical mindset

 - Proactive and self-motivated

 - Interest in how the business works and a product-oriented mindset
   

Recruitment process

HR interview - Interview - Team fit interview - Offer


Our Benefits

 - Time-off Policy - unlimited Out of office days

 - Remote or Hybrid work. The choice is yours!

 - Sport and education compensations

 - Psychologists compensation

 - Language courses compensation

 - Co-working compensation

 - Health insurance

 - 100% Sick Leave Compensation

 - Team buildings and offsites (Spain, Italy, Poland and other)

 - Merch

 - Birthday presents
   

What’s next?

If this role sounds like a fit — we’d love to hear from you! Just send over your CV and anything else you’d like us to consider.

We’ll review everything within five working days, and if your background matches what we’re looking for, we’ll get in touch to set up a call and get to know each other better.

source_jobs.title: Data Analyst
source_jobs.description:
We are toogeza, a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide. People make a difference in the big game, we may help to find the right ones.

We are currently looking for a Data Analyst for Spinlab.

Location: Remote
Job Type: Full-Time


ABOUT OUR CLIENT:


Spinlab: We help slot gaming leaders unlock the potential of their data, enhancing business outcomes and strengthening their competitive edge in the market. We collect and process data using advanced methods and technologies to provide our clients with clear, actionablerecommendations based on real metrics. SpinLab’s goal is not just to collect data but to help businesses use it for maximum efficiency and amplify their performance results.



Responsibilities:

 - Analyze large volumes of game and player data to identify patterns, trends, and dynamics, and turn them into clear business conclusions.

 - Translate findings into practical recommendations for product improvements, highlighting what works, what doesn’t, and what opportunities to explore

 - Perform deep-dive investigations into performance anomalies or game features to explain what happened and why

 - Collaborate with game designers, product managers, and developers to shape hypotheses and validate them through experimentation.

 - Support development and testing of predictive models (e.g., player LTV, churn, bonus optimization).

 - Communicate complex insights in a simple, compelling way to both technical and non-technical audiences.

 - Help define metrics frameworks for new products or features, expanding high-level requirements with your analytical thinking and product insights.

 - Build dashboards and reports to help stakeholders monitor key KPIs and make data-driven decisions.

Requirements:

 - 3+ years of experience as a Data Analyst or Data Scientist, preferably in the gaming or tech industry.

 - Strong analytical mindset and ability to find the story in the data: uncovering trends and explaining them in clear business terms.

 - Strong experience in SQL (BigQuery, PostgreSQL, or similar), and comfort working with large datasets.

 - Solid knowledge of data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI, Looker, or similar).

 - Practical experience with Python for data analysis and modeling.

 - Familiarity with statistical testing, experimentation, and predictive modeling techniques.

 - University degree in mathematics / computer science / technology / engineering

 - English B2+

Will be a plus:

 - Knowledge of the iGaming industry or understanding of slot game mechanics

 - Ability to look at games from players' point of view.

 - Product mindset: the ability to go beyond numbers and propose actionable solutions that make an impact.

Benefits:

 - Work on meaningful data products and shape them with your vision.

 - 25 vacation days + 15 sick days + 1 birthday leave.

 - Budget for English classes.

 - Budget for health insurance.

 - Annual education & development budget.

 - Flexible, remote-friendly culture with a small, dedicated team.



WHAT’S NEXT?

If this role sounds like a fit — we’d love to hear from you! Just send over your CV and anything else you’d like us to consider.

We’ll review everything within five working days, and if your background matches what we’re looking for, we’ll get in touch to set up a call and get to know each other better.

notes: Toogeza is a Ukrainian recruiting company that is focused on hiring talents and building teams for tech startups worldwide.
